source: Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.
foreignization: Fabio Capello muncul sebagai calon utama untuk menggantikan Steve McClaren sebagai ketua jurulatih baharu pasukan bola sepak England selepas José Mourinho menyatakan bahawa beliau tidak berminat untuk mengambil alih jawatan itu.

Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.

source: While the world knew him as a great storyteller that challenged our preconceived notions about the world around us — and entertained us all while doing so — his wife Sherri, daughter Taylor, family and friends knew Michael Crichton as a devoted husband, loving father and generous friend who inspired each of us to strive to see the wonders of our world through new eyes, said a statement by his family.

source: The report concludes by stating that decisions made by "multiple companies and work teams" contributed to the accident which it says arose from "a complex and interlinked series of mechanical failures, human judgments, engineering design, operational implementation and team interfaces."
foreignization: Laporan itu menyimpulkan dengan menyatakan bahawa keputusan yang dibuat oleh "beberapa syarikat dan pasukan kerja" menyumbang kepada kemalangan itu, yang menurutnya berpunca daripada "siri kegagalan mekanikal, penilaian manusia, reka bentuk kejuruteraan, pelaksanaan operasi dan interaksi pasukan yang kompleks dan saling berkaitan."
domestication: Laporan itu merumuskan dengan menyatakan keputusan itu dibuat oleh "banyak syarikat dan pasukan kerja" yang terlibat dalam kemalangan tersebut di mana ia menyatakan timbul dari "kegagalan siri mekanikal yang rumit dan bersambung, pertimbangan manusia, reka bentuk kejuruteraan, pelaksanaan operasi dan antara muka pasukan."

source: The report, the product of a four-month investigation conducted by BP's Head of Safety Operations, Mark Bly, criticizes the oil rig's fire prevention systems, the crew of the rig for failing to realize and act upon evidence that oil was leaking from the surface of the ocean, and describes how BP and Transocean "incorrectly accepted" negative pressure test results.
foreignization: Laporan itu, yang merupakan hasil daripada siasatan selama empat bulan yang dijalankan oleh Ketua Operasi Keselamatan BP, Mark Bly, mengkritik sistem pencegahan kebakaran platform minyak, anak kapal platform kerana gagal menyedari dan bertindak berdasarkan bukti bahawa minyak bocor dari permukaan laut, dan menjelaskan bagaimana BP dan Transocean "secara tidak tepat menerima" keputusan ujian tekanan negatif.

source: According to ExplorersWeb.com's founder, Tom Sjogren, the trio erased the previous record of 39 days, 7 hours and 49 minutes, which was set by American Todd Carmichael, the first American to cross Antarctica to the South Pole alone, on foot and with no assistance.

Translate the following text to Malay:
